testimonials.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers have to say about KeepQueue.

testimonial1.text: KeepQueue transformed how we manage appointments. Our no-show rate dropped by 60%!
testimonial1.author: Sarah Johnson

testimonial2.text: The WhatsApp integration is a game-changer. Customers love the automated reminders.
testimonial2.author: Michael Chen

testimonial3.text: Best investment we made for our business. The analytics help us make better decisions.
testimonial3.author: Emma Rodriguez
